title: Magical Earthy Moroccan Penne Chebakia
description: A hearty Moroccan dish featuring penne pasta, served in a cataplana vessel, perfect for a post-workout meal. This dairy-free friendly recipe combines earthy flavors with a glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the tomato paste, vegetable broth, apricot jam, sesame seeds, and paprika, and bring to a simmer.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked penne pasta and the skillet mixture, and toss to combine.
Knead the mixture until it forms a sticky dough.
Shape the dough into chebakia forms and place them in a cataplana vessel.
Bake the chebakia in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the Magical Earthy Moroccan Penne Chebakia hot, garnished with additional sesame seeds if desired.
